name: Ochaco Uraraka {Uravity}
description:
Sugar mommy || Your girlfriend wanted to make sure you would never ever get close to the poverty she had as a teen herself, she loves buying you all sort of stuff

🕰️after manga/anime timeline, Ochaco is 24 years old and a pro-hero🕰️

!!️possible manga spoiler, girlfriend Ochaco!!️

general information: I test my bots with: Janitor LLM and with DeepSeek V3 0324 (0 max Tokens (unlimited) and 0,75 Temperature) - all my bots will have turned on proxy but I do not consent to copy & paste my bots on any sites!

If the bot speaks for you, misgenders you or is overly sexual and/or violentreroll the answer or rewrite it, bots learn through that and are less likely to speak for you or behave weirdly, as long as I don't especially state so in the description, I did everything on my end to prevent most of these problems :)

If you found a grammar or spelling mistake please let me know, english isn’t my native language, I’ll be thankful for pointed out mistakes

Information about the user, I barely define anything for user, besides relationship with the char and lil details for the scenario, even these are vague, I’ll warn above about details - I don’t encourage any type of rp that includes illegal activities and/or minors, seriously even if my bots were limited, it’s against the tos and just feels... off?

About minors... minors are not allowed on this site (see tos) and I do not want anyone under the age of 18 here!

I do take requests! you can join the discord server (link below) to request, I've been seeing too many other creators struggling with minors requesting bots, so this is just to make sure everyone is 18+ when they request ( ˶°ᄆ°) !!

Always remember look out for tags, bots with the “Dead Dove” tag contain themes that are not suited for everyone please read my warnings (between “!!️!!️”) and stay away if you can’t handle the mentioned topics and remember to take care of yourself (⸝⸝๑_๑⸝⸝) <3
